pi_items.source: Task description explicitly requires enabling the 'Always on Top' window mode.
Task description explicitly requires setting the scanner to continuous/auto-scan mode.

privileged_info_summary: The task explicitly requires the agent to enable 'Always on Top' and 'continuous/auto-scan mode' via the bcWebCam UI. However, this task is critically defective because setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1, and verifier.py are entirely missing from the environment, making it impossible to programmatically score the task.
